title: alisma ranunculoides proles repens
intro: Alisma ranunculoides proles repens, also known as the lesser waterplantain or narrow-leaved waterplantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Alisma ranunculoides proles repens include relieving water retention, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of edema, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of certain infections. Alisma ranunculoides proles repens can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as dried roots, capsules, or teas, to be used for medicinal purposes.
